query: I just want to compute a few quick correlation matrices on a CSV file and throw the notebook away in an hour. Scaffold the project layout.
expected_behavior: Does NOT run the full 9-step scaffold for a throwaway 1-hour query
Explains that the scaffold overhead (pyproject, lockfile, src/ layout, tests, pre-commit) exceeds the benefit for genuine throwaway exploration
Suggests a lighter alternative — for example a single ad-hoc notebook with an inline seed call — and notes that if the work becomes a real project the user should come back to scaffold properly
